ddls:
CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "working_temperature" TEXT /* Working temperature range of the material */,
  "wear_resistance" TEXT /* Wear resistance of the material (e.g., Excellent, Good, Fair) */,
  "oil_resistance" TEXT /* Oil resistance of the material (e.g., Excellent, Good, Fair) */,
  "durometer" TEXT /* Durometer range of the material (e.g., A20-A75 Range) */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of the material (e.g., metal, plastic, composite) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the material */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date the material was manufactured */,
  "shelf_life" TEXT /* Shelf life of the material */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications the material has (e.g., ISO, FDA) */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material used in the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product (e.g., consumer, industrial) */,
  "manufacturing_process" TEXT /* Manufacturing process used for the product */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date the product was produced */,
  "shelf_life" TEXT /* Shelf life of the product */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications the product has (e.g., CE, UL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material in stock */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the material in stock */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the quantity (e.g., pounds, kilograms) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the material in the warehouse */,
  "reorder_level" REAL /* Threshold for automatic reordering */,
  "last_inventory_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory check */,
  "responsible_person" TEXT /* Person responsible for the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material ordered */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the material ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, received) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "purchase_order_number" TEXT /* Purchase order number */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed upon with the supplier */,
  "credit_rating" TEXT /* Credit rating of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., working temperature, wear resistance) */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property (e.g., +32 to +125º F, Excellent) */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the property value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_properties_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the component belongs to */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material used in the component */,
  "quantity_required" REAL /* Quantity of the material required for each component */,
  "manufacturing_process" TEXT /* Manufacturing process used for the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_components_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_components_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, quality control specialist, inventory manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material requested */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the material requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "justification" TEXT /* Reason for the material request */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_requests_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_requests_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product using the material */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material used */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the material used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the material was used */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the material used */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who used the material */,
  "quality_check_status" TEXT /* Status of the quality check (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_usage_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_usage_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_usage_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material involved in the log entry */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the material involved */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was made */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., usage, inventory update) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the log entry */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_log_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
